text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after my training session with Eishin
Flash...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing. The session just ended earlier than I
expected.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It shouldn't be possible for me to finish all of my
laps so quickly.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But when I check the numbers, all my laps are
accounted for, which can only mean one thing.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This never happened when I was training by
myself.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you. I could not have accomplished this
without your help.
choice_data_list: Of course. Now let's keep it up!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. We must set to work revising my training
schedule straight away.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I would appreciate any and all advice you can
give me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It looks like my coaching is paying off.
